subcodes.first_line: The spirit of deeds is the good-pleasure of God, for should a soul be adorned with all the goodly works in the world, yet be bereft of the sweet fragrance of Divine acceptance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روح اعمال رضای الهی بوده چه اگر نفس بجمیع اعمال حسنه عالم شود و عرف رضای حق
subcodes.subjects: @attaining good pleasure of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love and unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
